case_title: JOYCE, TAMMY et al vs. MARTIN, BRIAN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOYCE, TAMMY DAVIS, JIM RHEINHEART, JILL SCHMITT, MIKE AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN, BRIAN DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          FEB-20-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-19-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-31-1996

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-21-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAR-21-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), IF NO APPEARANCE OR GOOD CAUSE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-15-1996 CONTINUED FROM MAR-21-1996 TO APR-22-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-20-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON FEB-20-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR MAR-21-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
